title: croton alchorneifolius
intro: Croton alchorneifolius, also known as Bayur tree, is a tropical plant species native to Malaysia and Indonesia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its leaves which contain flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Croton alchorneifolius include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in traditional medicine to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The leaves can be prepared into herbal tea, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in local medicine to alleviate various health conditions.
